title: GASTAT Saudi Arabia — Annual National Accounts Publication 2024 (GDP by economic activity)
source_org: General Authority for Statistics (GASTAT), Saudi Arabia
time_coverage: annual national accounts, full-year 2024 (with historical comparison years in tables)
units: SAR (current and constant prices), % growth rates — described in file
notes: Original task target was GASTAT's Statistical Yearbook (last known edition: 53rd, for 2017, announced at https://www.stats.gov.sa/en/w/gastat-releases-the-53rd-edition-of-the-statistical-yearbook-2017- on 2018-05-16). That announcement page renders but contains no downloadable file link (news article only). The old Drupal-era catalog pages that indexed each yearbook edition (e.g. /en/193, /en/864, /en/node/153063 found via web search) all 404 on the current Liferay-based site — the site was fully rebuilt and old node paths were not redirected. Extensively searched the current site (main nav Statistics categories under Economic/Social/Environmental Statistics, sitewide search box, sitemap.xml, Google site: search) and found no 'Statistical Yearbook' entry anywhere in the current publication catalog; GASTAT appears to have discontinued the single consolidated Yearbook product (no edition found past 2017) in favor of per-topic annual/quarterly bulletins organized under statistics?index=X&subindex=Y category pages (same Liferay document-library pattern as the CPI series already in data/raw/gastat-saudi/cpi-series/). Per task instructions, substituted with GASTAT's National Accounts bulletin (Statistics > Economic Statistics > National Accounts Statistics > Gross Domestic Product Statistics), which is genuinely distinct content (GDP by economic activity, value added by sector) not covered by SAMA's monthly bulletin already in data/raw/sama-saudi/. Found via /statistics?index=119021&subindex=120034 -> expandable 'Annual National Accounts Publication 2024' entry with both PDF (2-page highlights) and XLSX (full data tables) Liferay document-library links.
